title: Test: Add API contract testing
original_text: Added API contract testing using Pact. Created consumer contracts for all API endpoints. Implemented contract verification in CI/CD pipeline. Added contract versioning and breaking change detection. Implemented contract testing for microservices communication. Added contract documentation and examples. Result: all contracts verified.
expected_subject: test(api): add API contract testing with Pact
expected_body_lines: - Create consumer contracts for all API endpoints
- Implement contract verification in CI/CD pipeline
- Add contract versioning and breaking change detection
expected_command: git commit -m "test(api): add API contract testing with Pact"
